Joinder Of California Department Of Insurance And Ricardo Lara, In His Capacity As Insurance Commissioner Of The State Of California, To Guardians Motion To Sever And Transfer Venue Of Severed Claims
Off Calendar Jun-23-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF INSURANCE and RICARDO LARA, In His Capacity As Insurance Commissioner Of The State Of California's Joinder To Guardian's Motion To Sever And Transfer Venue Of Severed Claims.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Guardian Life Insurance Company of America's unopposed motion "to sever and transfer venue of severed claims" is granted.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

Defendant Guardian Life Insurance Company Of Americas Notice Of Motion And Motion To Sever And Transfer Venue Of Severed Claims
Off Calendar Jun-23-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GUARDIAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA's Motion To Sever And Transfer Venue Of Severed Claims.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Guardian Life Insurance Company of America's unopposed motion "to sever and transfer venue of severed claims" is granted.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GUARDIAN LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The verified application of Joshua R. Hess for admission as counsel pro hac vice for defendant is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
